input.title: CentrexIT Microsoft 365 User Utilization
input.message:
To view the report, use the URL below:

https://engine.rewst.io/webhooks/custom/trigger/019cfd4c-6a1b-7d6a-b80f-9ba38a7774e7/01983d3f-ecb7-7b80-9d05-726dbe1a90d0
input.subject: CentrexIT Microsoft 365 User Utilization Report

template.body:
{% set report = CTX.report_data | d('{}') | from_json_string %} {% set summary = report.summary | d({}) %} {% set pricing = report.pricing_summary | d({}) %} {% set workloads = report.workload_summary | d({}) %} {% set user_rows = report.user_rows | d([]) %} {% set license_rows = report.license_rows | d([]) %}
CentrexIT Microsoft 365 Review

User utilization across the tenant

Focused on current assigned licenses, recent successful sign-in evidence, workload activity in the selected window, and price-based stale-license reclaim estimates where public Microsoft list pricing is available.

Total Users
{{ summary.total_users | d(0) }}
Licensed
{{ summary.licensed_users | d(0) }}
Stale
{{ summary.stale_users | d(0) }}
Stale Reclaim / Mo
${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.stale_monthly_reclaim | d(0)) }}
Priced License Coverage
{{ pricing.priced_assignment_count | d(0) }}/{{ pricing.total_assignment_count | d(0) }}

Current model notes

    {% for note in report.notes | d([]) %}
  • {{ note }}
    • {% endfor %}
  • Cost metrics use public US annual-commit Microsoft list prices for matched SKUs only. Ambiguous, bundled, or unpriced SKUs are excluded from estimates.

Executive Snapshot

Generated {{ report.generated_at | d('now') }} using {{ report.report_period | d('D30') }} workload windows and a {{ report.stale_days | d(90) }}-day stale-user threshold.

{{ summary.active_users | d(0) }}licensed and active
{{ summary.stale_users | d(0) }}licensed and stale
${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.stale_monthly_reclaim | d(0)) }}estimated monthly stale reclaim
${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.stale_annual_reclaim | d(0)) }}estimated annual stale reclaim
CategoryCountDirect meaningEstimated monthly exposure
Licensed and active{{ summary.active_users | d(0) }}Recent sign-in plus evidence in multiple workloads.${{ '%.2f'|format(0) }}
Licensed but low utilization{{ summary.low_utilization_users | d(0) }}License assigned, but only limited workload evidence in the current window.${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.low_monthly_review | d(0)) }}
Licensed and stale{{ summary.stale_users | d(0) }}No successful sign-in within the configured stale threshold.${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.stale_monthly_reclaim | d(0)) }}
Licensed with no workload evidence{{ summary.no_workload_users | d(0) }}Sign-in seen, but no workload usage surfaced in the report window.${{ '%.2f'|format(pricing.no_workload_monthly_review | d(0)) }}

Monthly exposure numbers are estimates from matched public list prices only. They are review candidates, not guaranteed reclaimable savings.

By User

Current license assignment is shown in full. Workload columns show direct activity evidence from the current report window.

Workload Adoption

M365 Apps{{ workloads.m365app | d(0) }}M365 Apps activity detected.

Recommendations

This queue is driven by direct evidence only: stale sign-in, no workload evidence, low utilization, or unlicensed accounts that still deserve review.

template.name: [ROC] CentrexIT M365 User Utilization Report
template.description: CentrexIT M365 user utilization hosted report

publish.email_addresses: {% if CTX.email_addresses is string %}{{ CTX.email_addresses.split(',') | map('trim') | reject('equalto', '') | list }}{% else %}{{ CTX.email_addresses | d(['jchristensen@centrexit.com']) }}{% endif %}

publish.exclusion_patterns: {% if CTX.exclusion_patterns is string %}{{ CTX.exclusion_patterns.split(',') | map('trim') | list }}{% else %}{{ CTX.exclusion_patterns | d(['svc', 'service', 'shared', 'breakglass', 'break-glass', 'backup', 'automation', 'noreply']) }}{% endif %}

publish.report_window_days: {% set period = (CTX.report_period | d('D30')) | upper %}{% if period == 'D7' %}7{% elif period == 'D90' %}90{% elif period == 'D180' %}180{% else %}30{% endif %}

nonfunctional_fields.description: CentrexIT-focused Microsoft 365 user utilization snapshot. First published draft: data collection and HTML rendering only, with triggers intentionally left unattached until review.

nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.exclusion_patterns.descriptio: UPN substrings to exclude from scoring.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.exclusion_patterns.label: Excluded User Patterns
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.include_disabled.description: Reserved for a later iteration; current scoring emphasizes enabled accounts.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.include_disabled.label: Include Disabled Users
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.report_period.description: Microsoft usage report period. Recommended values: D7, D30, D90, D180.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.report_period.label: Report Period
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.stale_days.description: Days without a successful sign-in before a user is considered stale.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.stale_days.label: Stale Threshold Days
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.tenant_name.description: Display name for the report header.
nonfunctional_fields.varsSchema.tenant_name.label: Tenant Name
